annotation_target.structure: Third phrase consequent — final settling of this phrase group
teaching_goals: same spacious character as all endings
style_tips: ppp — always quiet at the phrase endings

teaching_notes.note: Another quiet arrival — Satie never rushes the endings.

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 23–26 of Gymnopedie No. 1 (continuation of mm. 19–22), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 23–26 and describe the conclusion of the third phrase group.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 23–26.
Measures 23–26 complete the third phrase group quietly. The melody settles once more, reinforcing the piece's hypnotic repetitive structure. Let me loop mm. 23–26.
